creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 244008
patch v1

Hi,

I noticed this port is a little outdated.

I'd like to commit the attached update to the latest upstream tag.

I also modified the port to use DISTVERSION with the same format as upstream tags. Doing this removes the need to specify GL_TAGNAME, which is derived from it.

I'm using this here with no ill effects, a test in poudriere with most ports depending on it shows no issues.

Thanks in advance!
